final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple UI panels arranged in layered hierarchy — web Dashboard, mobile screens, cards, buttons, and controls all visible in one composition
Subject: must include:
  - Web Dashboard panel
  - Mobile interface screens
  - Card components
  - Button components
  - Control widgets (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep dark tech environment backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-tech atmosphere with strong depth and visual hierarchy — exact glow, bloom, and light accent choices are yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction — exact accent colors, gradients, and contrast ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glass-morphism or layered-surface treatment — exact sheen and depth are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all five UI component categories (Dashboard / mobile / cards / buttons / controls) as clearly readable, distinct elements
Avoid: flat or overly plain layouts that lack visual depth or tech atmosphere
